product: Customer-managed keys for Lakebase available in all AWS and Azure regions
tagline: Customer managed keys (CMK) for Lakebase Autoscaling are now available in all Lakebase regions on AWS and Azure.
what_it_does: Customer managed keys (CMK) for Lakebase Autoscaling are now available in all Lakebase regions on AWS and Azure. CMK encrypts Lakebase Autoscaling project data at rest using a key your organization owns in its cloud KMS. CMK is available for new Lakebase Autoscaling projects.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Customer managed keys (CMK) for Lakebase Autoscaling are now available in all Lakebase regions on AWS and Azure. CMK encrypts Lakebase Autoscaling project data at rest using a key your organization owns in its cloud KMS.
key_takeaway: Customer managed keys (CMK) for Lakebase Autoscaling are now available in all Lakebase regions on AWS and Azure.
